address_text.definition: The address of an Organisation, Person or Location as expressed for mailing purposes.
address_text.how_to_record: Use punctuation and capitalisation as required.
examples: Rich Mix, 35-47 Bethnal Green Road, London E1 6LA, United Kingdom
address_text.use: Record once only for an Address.

address_place.definition: The elements of an Address which are required for retrieval purposes.
address_place.how_to_record: It may be necessary to use several units of information, including for example, a town, city or country. The descriptions for these information units are gathered together under the Place heading.
address_place.use: As many times as required for an Address.

address_postcode.definition: The postcode or zip code of an Address.
address_postcode.how_to_record: As it is normally given, including spaces and capitalisation where integral to the code.
address_postcode.use: Record once only for an Address.

address_email.definition: The e-mail address used to contact an Organisation or Person.
address_email.use: As many times as required for an Address.

address_fax_number.definition: The fax number used to contact an Organisation or Person.
address_fax_number.how_to_record: As it is normally given, including the area or country code as required.
address_fax_number.use: As many times as required for an Address.

address_telephone_number.definition: The telephone number used to contact an Organisation or Person.
address_telephone_number.how_to_record: As it is normally given, including the area or country code as required.
address_telephone_number.use: As many times as required for an Address.

address_type.definition: The status or use of the Address recorded.
address_type.how_to_record: Use a single term, without punctuation or capitalisation. Maintain a list of standard terms.
address_type.use: As many as required for an Address.
